1133.issue: [W1133] [io-package.json](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.schoolfree/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "location.schoolName" role "indicator" expects common.type to be one of [boolean], but found "string"

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5022.issue: [S5022] Please consider migrating to admin 5 UI (jsonConfig) or react based UI.

5063.issue: [W5063] JSON formatting in "admin/locations.json" is hard to read (too few line breaks). Please use consistent indentation and proper line breaks.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

6019.issue: [W6019] [README.md](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.schoolfree/blob/master/README.md) contains 35 changelog entries. Consider adding CHANGELOG_OLD.md file supported by @alcalzone/releasescript.

6023.issue: [W6023] Sentry plugin is configured in [io-package.json](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.schoolfree/blob/master/io-package.json) but the required Sentry information was not found in [README.md](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.schoolfree/blob/master/README.md). Please add the standard Sentry notice near the top of [README.md](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.schoolfree/blob/master/README.md).

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. The current engines.node clause ">=20.0.0" allows Node.js 20.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=22" at [package.json](https://github.com/simatec/ioBroker.schoolfree/blob/master/package.json).
